messages.content: Hey, I need help registering for CSE 142. How do I sign up?
Sure! To register for CSE 142, you'll want to log into MyUW, go to the Registration section, and search for CSE 142. You'll need to make sure you have no registration holds on your account first.
How do I check if I have any holds?
In MyUW, click on 'Academics' and then 'Registration.' If you have any holds, they'll show up at the top with a red banner. Common holds include advising holds and tuition holds.
I think I might have an advising hold. How do I clear that?

You'll need to meet with your academic advisor. You can schedule an appointment through the Advising office for your department. Once they mark it as complete, the hold should be lifted within 24 hours.
Is CSE 142 usually full? Should I have a backup plan?

CSE 142 can fill up fast, especially in autumn quarter. I'd recommend having a backup section or adding yourself to the waitlist if your preferred section is full. You can also check Notify.UW to get alerts when a spot opens up.
